## Summary

Describe the user or engineering outcome and the narrow scope of this pull request.

## Why

Explain the problem, relevant context, and the trade-off chosen.

## Verification

List the exact commands and manual flows run, with their outcomes.

```text
npm run lint
npm run typecheck
npm run test
npm run build
```

## Visual evidence

For visible changes, add desktop/mobile and light/dark screenshots or a short recording. Remove candidate data and other personal information. Write “Not applicable” for a non-visual change.

## Impact review

- [ ] Organization scope and server-side authorization are preserved or not applicable.
- [ ] Untrusted input is validated and logs/errors do not expose secrets or personal data.
- [ ] Keyboard, focus, contrast, reduced motion, and 320 px layout were reviewed or not applicable.
- [ ] Loading, empty, error, and success states are covered or not applicable.
- [ ] Schema/migration, environment, provider, and deployment effects are documented or not applicable.
- [ ] Tests cover the behavior and important failure modes.
- [ ] README, architecture decisions, and unreleased changelog are updated when required.
